_note: Standalone langgraph.json for the Homestead realestate example. The dir name `realestate_agent/` matches the package name, so this entry uses canonical package-relative imports (`from .tools import ...` inside graph.py) — no sys.path hacks needed. This file is NOT used by the project-root `pnpm dev` flow today; the main `agent/langgraph.json` owns dev-server graph registration. It IS used by the per-example smoke probe (scripts/_smoke-examples.ts) and by the standalone Dockerfile (../Dockerfile).
